name: bedrock-agentic-reporting-system
description: Production AWS Bedrock agentic system: supervisor + collaborator agents + Bedrock Flow for routing, dispatch, orchestration, analytics and report generation across EDD / XShipReport / XShipDownload / Relationship use cases.

scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.synth:tf: cd terraform && terraform fmt -recursive && terraform validate
